    A

    AAppc - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.apps
    Base class of console-based apps.

    AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException - Ausnahmeklasse in de.btu.kt.syx.apps
    Thrown by command handlers if they do not accept the UI command.
    AAppc.ErrorReport - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.apps
    An error report containing an error counter and a list of error messages.

    ADD - Statische Variable in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Check sum aggregation by sum.
    addBank(String, String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree
    Adds a bank to this tree.
    addBankObject(String, String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree.Bank
    Adds a bank object node without a bank object to this bank.
    addBankObject(String, String, String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree
    Adds a bank object node without a bank object to a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees.
    addBankObject(String, String, T) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree
    Adds a bank object node with a bank object to a bank in this tree or in one of its sub-trees.
    addBankObject(String, T) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree.Bank
    Adds a bank object node with a bank object to this bank.
    addDataChangedListener(ISyxDataChangeListener) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Adds a data changed listener to this struct.

    Abschnitt
    addParamInfo() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.tutorials.GettingStarted
    Demonstrates how to add parameter information.
    addParamInfo(SyxParamInfo) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Adds parameter information to a parameter.
    addParts(SyxDataStruct...) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Adds system exclusive data structs to this message.
    addSysExListener(ISysexMessageListener) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Adds a system exclusive message listener to this MIDI interface.
    addSysExListener(ISysexMessageListener) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.SysexRecorder
    Adds a SysEx message listener to this recorder.
    addTree(String, String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree
    Adds a sub-tree to this tree.

    AInstrument - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.devices
    Abstract device model which facilitates communication with synthesizes via MIDI system exclusive messages.

    Creates a new hardware instrument wrapper.
    AInstrument(int, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.devices.AInstrument
    Creates a new hardware instrument wrapper.

    Run JUnit test cases.

    AMidiMonitor - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.util
    Instances of this class can be registered with MidiInterfaces in order to receive a log of MIDI input and output.
    AMidiMonitor() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.AMidiMonitor
    Creates a new MIDI monitor.
